title: pilosella balansae
intro: Pilosella balansae, also known as the Alpine Mouse-ear or Balansa's Mouse-ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pilosella balansae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Pilosella balansae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
